description_long: This is a military tank with a robust, angular hull and a large, centrally mounted turret featuring a long-barreled main cannon. The vehicle is painted in an olive drab color and displays prominent white star insignias and military stenciling on its surfaces. The tank is equipped with a mounted machine gun on top of the turret, as well as a visible radio antenna. Its tracks are wide and supported by multiple large road wheels, providing stability and traction for urban or rugged environments. The armor plating is thick and sloped, especially at the front and sides, offering enhanced protection. Additional details include hatches, periscopes, and various external fixtures typical of mid-20th-century armored vehicles.
description: A heavily armored olive drab military tank with a large turret, long cannon, and visible machine gun mount, featuring white star insignias and robust tracks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped frontal armor, main cannon, and a white star insignia on the glacis plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, the side armor, and the arrangement of the road wheels and tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, rear hatches, and a large white star marking on the engine deck.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the turret's side profile, machine gun mount, and the detailed track and wheel assembly.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret front, one machine gun mount on top of the turret, and a visible antenna mount.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with pronounced thickness, especially at the front and turret; sloped and welded panels for increased deflection and protection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive drab paint with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White star insignias on the front glacis and rear deck, white stenciled numbers and letters on the turret and hull sides.
